meta.title: WorkAfterAI
meta.description: From AI job anxiety to a clear next move.

sampleData.title: Viewing sample report
sampleData.description: Complete the quick 2-minute onboarding scan to personalize this data for your specific role and tasks.

hero.title: Know your AI job risk. Build your next move.
hero.subtitle: WorkAfterAI scans your role, shows which tasks AI can automate, and gives you safer paths plus a 30-day rebuild plan.
hero.audience: Built for workers, freelancers, and career switchers worried their work is changing.

problem.title: The threat is not your whole job. It is the tasks inside it.
problem.body: Maybe clients ask for more with smaller budgets. Maybe support replies feel automated. Maybe writing, research, and admin work are getting cheaper. You need a clear view of what is exposed.

tasks.label: Writing & content
tasks.description: Drafts, summaries, posts, and briefs are now easier to produce with AI.

tasks.label: Support & admin work
tasks.description: Common replies, scheduling, routing, and notes are being handled by tools.

tasks.label: Research & operations
tasks.description: Comparisons, reports, data cleanup, and process checks are becoming less manual.

who.title: If this feels familiar, this is for you.

audiences.title: Your role now includes AI pressure
audiences.description: You see tasks getting automated and want to know what to protect.

audiences.title: You were laid off or lost clients
audiences.description: You need a next direction that uses the experience you already have.

audiences.title: You want to move before you must
audiences.description: You want a safer path without guessing what to learn.

audiences.title: You sell services or freelance
audiences.description: You need proof that your work still matters in an AI-heavy market.

audiences.title: You want to become AI-ready
audiences.description: You want practical workflows, not another vague course.

steps.title: Scan your role
steps.description: Answer a few questions. See your exposed tasks.

steps.title: Choose a safer path
steps.description: Get pivot paths that fit your experience.

steps.title: Build proof
steps.description: Create samples that show AI-ready skills.

steps.title: Follow the plan
steps.description: Use the 30-day roadmap to act today.

features.title: What you will walk away with.
features.body: A clearer risk picture, a smarter direction, and proof you can use.

cards.title: See how at risk your role is
cards.description: Get a simple score based on the tasks you actually do.

cards.title: Know what to learn next
cards.description: Focus on skills that make your experience harder to replace.

cards.title: Protect your human edge
cards.description: Spot the judgment, empathy, and context AI still needs you for.

cards.title: Build proof, not just confidence
cards.description: Turn your learning into samples people can review.

cards.title: Aim at better-fit opportunities
cards.description: Move toward roles where AI makes your background more useful.

preview.title: A report that tells you what to do next.
preview.body: See exposed tasks, human strengths, safer paths, and the first skills to build.

finalCta.title: Stop guessing. Scan your role and plan your next move.
finalCta.body: Free scan. Takes about 2 minutes. No resume required.
finalCta.note: No signup. No pressure. Just a clearer starting point.

riskPreview.title: AI Job Risk Report
riskPreview.nextMove: Start with customer workflows AI can support, not replace.

welcome.title: Let's understand where you are right now.
welcome.body: Answer a few practical questions so your scan can personalize the next steps around your role, daily tasks, AI comfort level, and rebuild goal.

situation.title: How is AI affecting your work?
options: I'm worried AI may replace parts of my job
I recently lost my job or clients
I need small projects or income now

role.title: What role are you rebuilding from?
role.body: This is not a job application. It helps shape the scan around work you actually do.

tasks.title: Which tasks are part of your current work?
tasks.description: Choose every task that shows up in your week. This helps shape your risk scan.

aiSkill.title: How comfortable are you using AI tools today?
aiSkill.description: There is no wrong answer. This helps us build a realistic plan.

goal.title: What do you want to achieve next?

focus.title: Your scan will focus on
items: AI job risk in your current work
Safer pivot paths and next skills

summary.title: Your scan is ready.
summary.body: We've prepared a personalized AI Job Risk starting point based on your situation.

score.label: AI Job Risk Report
score.title: Your AI Disruption Score
score.scoreNote: Medium risk means your role is changing, and you still have room to move early.

result.supportiveExplanation: Your role is not disappearing overnight — but these tasks are becoming easier to automate.

tasksAtRisk.title: Basic writing
tasksAtRisk.explanation: First drafts, summaries, and repeatable content can now be produced quickly with AI assistance.

tasksAtRisk.title: Data entry
tasksAtRisk.explanation: Structured information can be extracted, cleaned, and moved between tools with fewer manual steps.

tasksAtRisk.title: Repetitive customer replies
tasksAtRisk.explanation: Common questions and routine responses are increasingly handled by templates and AI support tools.

humanStrengthsSection.title: These strengths keep you valuable.
humanStrengthsSection.body: AI can speed up routine output, but your value grows when you pair tools with human judgment, context, and care.

humanStrengths.title: Judgment
humanStrengths.explanation: Choosing the right action when the situation is unclear.

humanStrengths.title: Empathy
humanStrengths.explanation: Reading emotion, trust, urgency, and context in human conversations.

humanStrengths.title: Domain context
humanStrengths.explanation: Knowing what matters in your team, customers, market, and workflow.

humanStrengths.title: Communication
humanStrengths.explanation: Explaining decisions clearly and adapting tone to the person receiving it.

humanStrengths.title: Taste / quality control
humanStrengths.explanation: Spotting weak output and raising the standard before work ships.

pivotSection.title: Directions that build on your existing experience.

pivotPaths.title: AI Content Strategist
pivotPaths.whyItFits: Your writing and communication experience can shift from producing every draft to directing useful AI-assisted content.
pivotPaths.firstSkill: Prompt workflows for briefs, drafts, and edits

pivotPaths.title: Workflow Automation Assistant
pivotPaths.whyItFits: Your knowledge of repeated tasks can become a strength when you map and improve manual workflows.

pivotPaths.title: Customer Success AI Operator
pivotPaths.whyItFits: Support experience, empathy, and product context are valuable when paired with AI-assisted response systems.
pivotPaths.firstSkill: AI quality review for customer replies

skillsSection.title: Start with practical skills that make your work more AI-ready.

skillsToBuild.title: Prompt workflows
skillsToBuild.description: Build repeatable prompts for drafting, editing, triage, and decision support.

skillsToBuild.title: AI-assisted research
skillsToBuild.description: Use AI to compare, summarize, and organize information without losing context.

skillsToBuild.title: Automation basics
skillsToBuild.description: Learn how tasks move between tools and where simple automation can help.

skillsToBuild.title: Quality control
skillsToBuild.description: Review AI output for accuracy, tone, edge cases, and user impact.

skillsToBuild.title: Portfolio storytelling
skillsToBuild.description: Turn your rebuild work into proof that explains the problem, process, and result.

roadmapPreview.title: Four weeks from risk clarity to proof and opportunity.

cta.title: Turn this report into a focused 30-day rebuild plan.
cta.body: Keep the momentum while the next step is clear and specific.

summary.title: Your 30-Day Career Rebuild Plan
summary.body: Turn your AI risk insight into a practical, step-by-step rebuild path.

plan.title: Your 30-Day Career Rebuild Plan
plan.nextAction: List 5 tasks in your current role that AI can already assist.

progress.title: Focus on the next useful action.
progress.body: You do not need to solve the whole career shift today. Move one practical task forward and let the plan compound.

roadmap.title: Four weeks from clarity to proof.

weeks.title: Understand your risk
weeks.description: Map the parts of your current work that are most exposed to automation and the human strengths worth protecting.

tasks.title: List 5 tasks AI can already assist
Choose one role direction to test

weeks.title: Learn AI-assisted workflows
weeks.description: Practice using AI as a workflow partner so your existing experience becomes more useful, not less visible.

tasks.title: Rewrite your role into 3 AI-assisted directions
Compare 2 AI tools relevant to your work

weeks.title: Build proof-of-work projects
weeks.description: Turn learning into a visible sample that shows how you solve a real work problem with AI support.

tasks.title: Ask one trusted person for feedback

weeks.title: Apply to rebuild-friendly opportunities
weeks.description: Update your positioning and aim toward roles or projects where your AI-assisted workflow skills are useful.

tasks.title: Update your profile headline for your target role
Draft a portfolio case study outline

dailyTasks.title: Small tasks that make the plan real.

items.title: List 5 tasks in your current role that AI can already assist
Rewrite your current role into 3 AI-assisted directions
Compare 2 AI tools relevant to your work
Draft a portfolio case study outline
Update your profile headline for your target role

skillGap.title: Keep your strengths. Add the missing workflows.
skillGap.summary: You already understand customer needs and communication. The gap is turning that experience into AI-assisted workflows and visible proof-of-work.

proof.title: Build evidence, not just confidence.
proof.body: By the end of the plan, you should have small, visible proof that shows how you work with AI in a practical setting.

messages: You do not need to solve everything this week.
Your next move only needs to be clear enough to start.

cta.title: Your next task is clear enough to start.
cta.body: Keep this practical. One finished task creates more momentum than a perfect plan.

header.title: Welcome back. Your next move is clear.
header.body: Track your AI risk, rebuild progress, and next useful action.

todayTask.body: Start with a concrete list. It turns vague anxiety into work you can evaluate and improve.

items.title: Continue today's rebuild task
items.description: Move the current task forward while the next step is clear.

items.title: Build one proof-of-work sample
items.description: Turn one AI-assisted workflow into visible evidence.

items.title: Review your AI risk report
items.description: Revisit the tasks and strengths shaping your plan.

opportunities.title: Rebuild-friendly paths to keep in view.

items.title: Customer Success AI Operator
items.matchReason: Matches your support experience, communication strengths, and next AI workflow skill.
items.firstSkillRequired: AI quality review for customer replies

items.title: Workflow Automation Assistant
items.matchReason: Builds on your knowledge of repeated tasks and where manual work slows teams down.

cta.title: Small proof beats vague intention.
cta.body: Stay close to the task that creates evidence today.
